skills.name: garch-volatility
skills.does: Walk-forward GARCH(1,1) vol forecast → regime → vol-targeted size.
skills.headline: Vol-targeting MaxDD 39.0% → 24.6%, Sharpe 0.73 → 0.84

skills.name: stationarity-tests
skills.does: ADF+KPSS+PP fused verdict, integration order, cointegration → pairs backtest.
skills.headline: USTEC price is I(1) — a random walk. MeanRev reverts to an SMA, not a level (leveraged beta).
skills.verdict: GATE — screen is predictive of tradeability

skills.name: pairs (stat-arb)
skills.does: Walk-forward cointegration pairs backtest, costs modeled.
skills.headline: Screen predicts tradeability, but no pair clears Sharpe≥1 on liquid instruments.
skills.verdict: HONEST NULL — refuses to over-trade noise

caveats: USTEC price is I(1): MeanRev_NDX is leveraged bull-beta, not level-reversion. Size it down (GARCH).
Static-cointegration daily pairs are marginal-to-null on liquid instruments — the screen correctly gates them.
Textbook pair EWA~EWC has drifted OUT of cointegration since its original window (relationships are non-stationary).
Every backtest here is bar-level, perfect-fill, walk-forward. Honest-tick execution will erode edges further.

stationarity.levels: NON-STATIONARY (unit root, I(1)+) -- ADF & KPSS agree
